About

Clarla Beauty

Hi, I’m Carla Beatriz,
the Founder of Carla Beauty.

At Carla Beauty, our commitment lies in personalized service in enhancing natural beauty of individuals. With a focus on the client's style and skin type, we create customized makeup looks using high-quality products and staying updated on the latest trends. As a L'Oréal Certified professional makeup artist with over a decade of experience in Brazil and Canada, my goal is to provide clients with an unforgettable experience that leaves them feeling beautiful and confident.
